intro: St. Brendan's ER, February. A frozen night that will not stay quiet.
outro: The rig pulls out. The bay doors close. The season's central wound is open before anyone has named it.

sections.title: Frozen Ground
sections.what: Dana arrives at the ambulance bay on a bitter February night. Theo clocks her name on the manifest. Maeve is nowhere in sight yet.

sections.title: Bay One
sections.what: Multi-vehicle pile-up floods the bays. Dana's rig first through. She and Maeve take the critical together — one look, no words about Cork.

sections.title: The Choreography
sections.what: They work the trauma in clinical silence, moving with muscle memory of a shared past. Everyone in the bay feels the unspoken weight.

sections.title: The Spine Holds
sections.what: Reza struggles with a secondary patient; Theo steadies him. Sister Agnes crosses the bay and sees what no one else is naming.

sections.title: Off the Clock
sections.what: Pile-up clears. Dana signs transfer paperwork at the nurses' station. Maeve passes without stopping. Nothing is said.

sections.title: Last Rig Out
sections.what: Dana walks back to her rig through the ambulance bay. Cold air. She pauses at the threshold but does not look back.
